revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Eight_Ryukyu_Shrines]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbar |title = Shrines in Okinawa |listclass = hlist |bodyclass = hlist |list = * {{ill|Ameku-gū|ja|天久宮}} * {{ill|Asato-Hachimangū|ja|安里八幡宮}} * {{ill|Chojugu Shrine|ja|波上宮}} * {{ill|Futemma-gū|ja|普天満宮}} * {{ill|Kin-gū|ja|金武宮}} * {{ill|Shikina-gū|ja|識名宮}} * {{ill|Sueyoshi-gū|ja|末吉宮}} * {{ill|Tenmangu Shrine|ja|沖宮}} * {{ill|Ukishima Shrine|ja|波上宮}} }}"
Copying from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:original pages]][[Category:original pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Ryukyu Eight Shrines]] to [[Template:Eight Ryukyu Shrines]]

Copying from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-20]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: attributing pages to myself
renaming Tenmangu Shrine
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Eight Ryukyu Shrines]] to [[Template:Okinawan Shrines]]
Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-20 (2)]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "sn|沖宮}}" to "sn|沖宮|nl|note=A bit of confusion over the origin of this but it is not supposed to be Oki no Gu}}"
Text replacement - "ja|沖宮" to "ja|沖宮|1=Oki-no-gū‎"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "Yomochi Shrine and Ukishima Shrine" to "Ukishima Shrine and Yomochi Shrine"
Text replacement - "|lt=Yomochi Shrine" to "|lt=Yomochi Shrine|1=Ukishima Shrine and Yomochi Shrine#Yomochi Shrine"
Removing from [[Category:Bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|沖縄県の神社の歴史" to "|沖縄県の神社の歴史|1=History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Bump1-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Shrine templates]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Bot: add category Category:Shinto shrines in Okinawa Prefecture
Bot: append Wikidata-derived interwikis
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa and forks
Bot: remove deleted category Okinawa
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: remove deleted category Shinto in Okinawa
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "Ukishima Shrine and Yomochi Shrine" to "Yomochi Shrine and Ukishima Shrine"
Text replacement - "Yomochi Shrine and Ukishima Shrine" to "Yomochi and Ukishima Shrines"
Text replacement - "user:immanuelle" to "User:Immanuelle"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q20703957)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]

Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 3 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
